commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Master. Hebrew, "the watcher, and him who answers "on guard. (Calmet)
Septuagint, "doth such things, till he be tumbled out "
Him. Septuagint, "and out of those who offer a sacrifice to "Such people shall be excluded from the society of God's servants. (Haydock)
